title: Huracán Ramírez
writer: Juan Rodríguez Mas, Joselito Rodríguez, Jesús Saucedo
actors: David Silva, Titina Romay, Carmelita González
plot: Veteran wrestler Tonina has a pet peeve the masked Huracan because he fails to respond to his challenges. What he doesn't know is that the masked man is actually his own son Fernando. The deceit will, undoubtedly, cause only mayhem.
